NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Jun-02-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel, or interested person.

There being no appearances, the matter is dismissed without prejudice.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
